about.visionLead: We envision a future where businesses of all sizes harness the power of AI to unlock unprecedented growth, efficiency, and innovation. Our mission is to make AI solutions accessible, understandable, and actionable for every organization.
about.approachLead: Every solution we create is designed not just to leverage the latest AI technologies, but to empower your team, enhance your capabilities, and drive sustainable growth.

team.title: Team
team.intro: LOTRINO is built by two co-founders who combine strategic vision with hands-on delivery - so AI stays practical, understandable, and built to last.
team.janBio: Focuses on product direction, clarity of experience, and helping clients see what AI can do in practice.
